# Areté Float + Wellness

> A small, independently-owned wellness sanctuary in Carrboro, NC offering
> floatation therapy, infrared sauna, contrast therapy (cold plunge + sauna),
> halotherapy, red light therapy, massage, and a curated retail room.

Areté is located at 213 E. Braxton Foushee St, Carrboro, NC 27510. Phone:
919-636-9899. Hours: Mon–Thu 9 AM – 8 PM, Fri–Sat 9 AM – 9 PM, Sun 10 AM – 6 PM.

The studio was founded by Jen and is built around a single idea: every room
should help you get out of your head and back into your body. No phones, no
noise, no rushing.

## Pages

- [Home](https://floatarete.com/): overview of the sanctuary, services, and brand
- [Float Tank](https://floatarete.com/float.html): 1,000 lbs of Epsom salt, sensory deprivation floats, 60 or 90 minute sessions from $89
- [Infrared Sauna](https://floatarete.com/sauna.html): deep-heat infrared sessions, 30 or 45 min from $45
- [Contrast Therapy](https://floatarete.com/Contrast-Therapy.html): cold plunge + sauna alternation for recovery, inflammation, mental clarity
- [Massage](https://floatarete.com/Massage.html): therapeutic bodywork (Swedish, deep tissue, recovery), 60 or 90 min from $95
- [Halotherapy](https://floatarete.com/halotherapy.html): dry-salt micronized therapy for respiratory and skin support, 45 min from $30
- [Red Light Therapy](https://floatarete.com/red_light.html): full-spectrum red and near-infrared, 20 or 40 min from $35
- [Retail Room](https://floatarete.com/retail.html): curated home goods, apothecary, skincare, and small-batch objects
- [Memberships & Pricing](https://floatarete.com/memberships.html): packages, monthly memberships, gift cards
- [Blog](https://floatarete.com/blog.html): field notes on contrast therapy, floating, recovery, skincare, and rest

## Booking

Sessions are booked through FloatHelm at:
https://aretefloattank.floathelm.com/booking
